data.body:
## Description
Write an integration test that verifies the complete onboarding output works end-to-end. The test must use a temporary scratch git repo (mktemp + git init), NOT the DSO plugin repo, to avoid polluting the plugin source tree.

Test assertions:
1. After simulated onboarding, dso-config.conf is parseable by read-config.sh with no errors
2. dso-config.conf contains all required keys (dso.plugin_root, format.*, test_gate.test_dirs, commands.validate, tickets.directory, checkpoint.marker_file, review.behavioral_patterns)
3. The generated hook installation instructions reference pre-commit-test-gate and pre-commit-review-gate
4. SKILL.md still passes all 42 structural assertions

This is a metadata/schema validation test per the Behavioral Test Requirement exemption — it validates the structure of the SKILL.md output, not runtime behavior.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-onboarding-e2e.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] Integration test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-e2e.sh
- [ ] Integration test passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-e2e.sh
- [ ] All existing skill tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
